content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp;

CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS
SELECT d.*, NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG
FROM decision_table d
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';

UPDATE J09D_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN HAUS IN (
        SELECT HAUS FROM (
            SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count
            FROM J09D_temp
            GROUP BY HAUS
        )
        WHERE eq_count < 3
    ) THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld');
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_joined;

CREATE TABLE J09D_joined AS
SELECT 
    t.*, 
    g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS MR_Doc_No,
    g.Installation AS G_Installation
FROM J09D_temp t
LEFT JOIN eablg g ON t.ANLAGE = g.Installation;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_joined2;

CREATE TABLE J09D_joined2 AS
SELECT 
    j.*, 
    n.TITLE AS N_TITLE, n.FORENAME AS N_FORENAME, n.SURNAME AS N_SURNAME,
    n.STREET AS N_STREET, n.STREETNO AS N_STREETNO, n.POST_CODE1 AS N_POST_CODE1,
    n.CITY1 AS N_CITY1, n.CITY2 AS N_CITY2, n.EMAIL AS N_EMAIL,
    s.TITLE AS S_TITLE, s.FORENAME AS S_FORENAME, s.SURNAME AS S_SURNAME,
    s.STREET AS S_STREET, s.STREETNO AS S_STREETNO, s.POST_CODE1 AS S_POST_CODE1,
    s.CITY1 AS S_CITY1, s.CITY2 AS S_CITY2, s.EMAIL AS S_EMAIL
FROM J09D_joined j
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON j.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON j.EQUNR = s.EQUNR;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_final;

CREATE TABLE J09D_final AS
SELECT
    j2.*, 
    CASE 
        WHEN S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN S_TITLE
        ELSE N_TITLE
    END AS TITLE,
    CASE 
        WHEN S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN S_FORENAME
        ELSE N_FORENAME
    END AS FORENAME,
    CASE 
        WHEN S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN S_SURNAME
        ELSE N_SURNAME
    END AS SURNAME,
    CASE 
        WHEN S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN S_STREET
        ELSE N_STREET
    END AS STREET,
    CASE 
        WHEN S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN S_STREETNO
        ELSE N_STREETNO
    END AS STREETNO,
    CASE 
        WHEN S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN S_POST_CODE1
        ELSE N_POST_CODE1
    END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE 
        WHEN S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN S_CITY1
        ELSE N_CITY1
    END AS CITY1,
    CASE 
        WHEN S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN S_CITY2
        ELSE N_CITY2
    END AS CITY2,
    CASE 
        WHEN S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN S_EMAIL
        ELSE N_EMAIL
    END AS EMAIL
FROM J09D_joined2 j2;

UPDATE J09D_final
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
    SELECT e24.EQUNR
    FROM eabl e24
    JOIN eabl e23 ON e24.EQUNR = e23.EQUNR
    WHERE e24."Record created on" LIKE '2024%'
      AND e23."Record created on" LIKE '2023%'
      AND e24.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
      AND e23.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
);

args.sql_query:
SELECT 
    f."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    f.HAUS,
    f.ANLAGE,
    f.ME_MA_ID,
    f.EQUNR,
    f.HOUSE_NUM1,
    f.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    f.TITLE,
    f.FORENAME,
    f.SURNAME,
    f.STREET,
    f.STREETNO,
    f.POST_CODE1,
    f.CITY1,
    f.CITY2,
    f.EMAIL
FROM J09D_final f
WHERE f.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

structured_content.error: no such column: f.Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.

args.sql_query:
SELECT 
    f.MR_Doc_No AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    f.HAUS,
    f.ANLAGE,
    f.ME_MA_ID,
    f.EQUNR,
    f.HOUSE_NUM1,
    f.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_TITLE ELSE f.N_TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_FORENAME ELSE f.N_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_SURNAME ELSE f.N_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_STREET ELSE f.N_STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_STREETNO ELSE f.N_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_POST_CODE1 ELSE f.N_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_CITY1 ELSE f.N_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_CITY2 ELSE f.N_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_EMAIL ELSE f.N_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09D_final f
WHERE f.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

args.sqlite_command:
UPDATE J09D_final
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
    SELECT e24.EQUNR
    FROM eabl e24
    JOIN eabl e23 ON e24.EQUNR = e23.EQUNR
    WHERE e24."Record created on" LIKE '2024%'
      AND e23."Record created on" LIKE '2023%'
      AND e24.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
      AND e23.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
);

args.sql_query:
SELECT 
    f.MR_Doc_No AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    f.HAUS,
    f.ANLAGE,
    f.ME_MA_ID,
    f.EQUNR,
    f.HOUSE_NUM1,
    f.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_TITLE ELSE f.N_TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_FORENAME ELSE f.N_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_SURNAME ELSE f.N_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_STREET ELSE f.N_STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_STREETNO ELSE f.N_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_POST_CODE1 ELSE f.N_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_CITY1 ELSE f.N_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_CITY2 ELSE f.N_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_EMAIL ELSE f.N_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09D_final f
WHERE f.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL';

SELECT 
    f.MR_Doc_No AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    f.HAUS,
    f.ANLAGE,
    f.ME_MA_ID,
    f.EQUNR,
    f.HOUSE_NUM1,
    f.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_TITLE ELSE f.N_TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_FORENAME ELSE f.N_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.S_SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_SURNAME ELSE f.N_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_STREET ELSE f.N_STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_STREETNO ELSE f.N_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_POST_CODE1 ELSE f.N_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_CITY1 ELSE f.N_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_CITY2 ELSE f.N_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN (f.S_EMAIL IS NOT NULL OR f.S_STREET IS NOT NULL OR f.SURNAME IS NOT NULL)
         THEN f.S_EMAIL ELSE f.N_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09D_final f
WHERE f.ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL') OR f.ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL;

kwargs.content:
The process for `process_rule_id = 'J09D'` has been executed end‑to‑end according to the stored rule.

Key actions and results:

- Created working copies (`J09D_temp`, joined through `eablg`, `net_master`, `sales_master`) and applied all ENTSCHEIDUNG rules (`KSA` / `EVU`, special house numbers, address areas, MANDATORY_READING, DIRECT_MAIL).
- Built the final dataset with customer/master data chosen as:
  - If sales data exists for an EQUNR → use sales data.
  - Otherwise → use net data.
